video.title: Sonny Colbrelli wins Paris-Nice 2017 stage two

all_candidates.title: Greipel sprints to victory at Stage 5 of the Paris-Nice
Julian Alaphilippe secures the yellow jersey at Stage 4 of Paris-Nice
Sonny Colbrelli wins Paris-Nice 2017 stage two
Just How Dangerous Is Cycling? | The GCN Show Ep. 218
Prepare Your Bike For The Maratona Dles Dolomites Event | Road Bike Maintenance

transcript.clean_text: and 1 kilom remaining is elini trying to go off the front for Ora Scott the Swiss Rider who so often reads the two leaves correctly he's been patient towards the back they had a difficult day yesterday orus Scots this would put matters to right for them but it's not going to be surely as now Robbie Wagner starts the lead out moving Dylan gragen into the prime position de and Cole fights for the Dutchman's wheel Alexander Kristoff he's waiting patiently de and Cole rubbing shoulders leaport comes through with a black Jersey on for the CAA Squad alberini CS dear waits in the yellow Jersey patiently waiting Bennett is there for Bora GLE now with the Grimace as GLE opens up dear responds desperately trying to get his nose in front Sunny Co brle leading out for pain here's the man to pits Co brle charging dear is coming de Cole desperately trying to Lunge over the top it'll be close and it will be Cole brle who holds on for the win Sunny coold Bry has done enough to hold on and it's a big yell as he goes across the Finish Line the others waited but perhaps they waited too long or they just weren't strong enough Sunny cold BR collects the Victory and isn't he delighted new team new season a big results his first year up in the world tour from a career that's been spent in one of the second teams in Italy with bani he's joined barain Mara in 2017 and the rain has been washed away by Tears well Sunny Co Bry at the front on his own no teammates for supports and was patient or was he he went with 200 M remaining that's a long way to go he was just simply too strong deal was coming so to De Cole but s brle Sunny C brle just found a little bit more the expression on his face says it all 15th win in his career he nearly got the arms up too soon we've seen that happen already this season
